headline: Fidelity introduces Trader+ — advanced AI-powered trading platform for active investors
summary: Fidelity Investments launched Fidelity Trader+, a professional-grade trading platform designed for active retail and semi-professional investors. The platform integrates AI-powered market analysis, customizable screeners, advanced charting with pattern recognition, and real-time risk monitoring across multi-asset portfolios. Trader+ targets the growing segment of self-directed investors who demand institutional-quality tools without the cost of a Bloomberg terminal. The launch signals Fidelity's intent to compete directly with platforms like Interactive Brokers and Webull for the sophisticated retail trader segment.

key_stat.label: Fidelity customers eligible for Trader+ access
